name: hashlock
description: OTC crypto trading with HTLC atomic settlement. Create trades, lock assets, and settle trustlessly across Ethereum, Bitcoin, and Sui.

tools.name: create_htlc
tools.description: Create and fund an HTLC for atomic OTC settlement

tools.name: withdraw_htlc
tools.description: Claim an HTLC by revealing the preimage

tools.name: refund_htlc
tools.description: Refund an HTLC after timelock expiry

tools.name: get_htlc
tools.description: Query HTLC status for a trade

tools.name: create_rfq
tools.description: Create a Request for Quote to buy or sell crypto

tools.name: respond_rfq
tools.description: Submit a price quote for an open RFQ

HASHLOCK_ACCESS_TOKEN.description: 7-day JWT issued via SIWE login at https://hashlock.markets/sign/login (Ethereum wallet signature). Re-sign after expiry.

HASHLOCK_ENDPOINT.description: GraphQL API endpoint override. Defaults to the production endpoint; rarely needs to be changed.
